overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through an industrial urban district with elevated highways, large teal support pillars, and industrial warehouses. The player walks under overpasses, turns at a corner with advertisement walls, and crosses an intersection featuring a large cylindrical industrial tower marked with '03' while futuristic vehicles and pedestrians populate the scene.

events.description: futuristic black sedan passes by on the right side of the road
slight drift to the right while continuing forward under the overpass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the elevated highway through the industrial district with teal support pillars

notable_agents.action: futuristic silver car driving along the road parallel to the player

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure overhead with metal support beams
large cylindrical industrial pillars painted teal supporting the overhead highway
brown industrial warehouse with corrugated metal walls and piping

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking beneath a massive elevated highway overpass in an industrial district. Large teal support pillars line the left side while a rusted industrial warehouse stands on the right. Futuristic vehicles occasionally pass by on the asphalt road as the player moves steadily forward through the sheltered, partially covered environment.

events.description: turning right at corner reveals wall covered with colorful advertisements and posters
slowing pace while approaching the intersection ahead

agents.ego_description: navigating a right turn at the industrial corner while passing the advertisement wall

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red shirt standing near the industrial building entrance

entered.detail: long concrete wall covered with colorful posters and digital advertisements
tall vertical holographic billboard displaying animated advertisements

segments.scene_description: The player turns right at an industrial corner where a concrete wall covered in colorful advertisements comes into view on the left. The elevated highway structure shifts to the left as the camera turns, revealing a digital billboard on the right. Sparse pedestrians appear near the buildings as the player approaches an open intersection.

events.description: exiting covered street into open intersection with large cylindrical industrial tower
waiting at traffic light then crossing the street with other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection while navigating around stopped vehicles and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: futuristic gray car stopped at the red traffic light
pedestrian in yellow jacket crossing the street in the same direction

entered.detail: massive cylindrical concrete industrial tower with large white '03' painted on the side
traffic light pole with red light illuminated at the intersection corner
white painted zebra crossing lines on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the covered street into a wide-open industrial intersection dominated by a massive cylindrical tower marked with '03'. The environment becomes exposed to full sunlight as the player crosses the street at the crosswalk, waiting for the traffic light alongside other pedestrians and navigating around stopped futuristic vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street with distant city towers

events.description: view opens up to reveal distant futuristic skyscrapers beyond the industrial structures

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the industrial area past the intersection with the cylindrical tower

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking along the sidewalk next to the gray industrial building

entered.detail: low-rise gray concrete industrial building with small windows and metal doors
tall industrial street light with multiple fixtures

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the player continues through a more open industrial street with a gray industrial building on the left. The cylindrical tower with '03' falls behind as the view opens up to reveal distant futuristic skyscrapers beyond the immediate industrial structures. The elevated highway remains visible overhead as the player moves through the sparse pedestrian traffic.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the sheltered shadows of an industrial overpass into a wide, sunlit urban intersection. It begins by moving beneath a massive elevated highway, flanked by large teal support pillars and a rusted warehouse as futuristic vehicles pass on the asphalt. As the camera turns right at a concrete corner, the view shifts from the covered structure toward colorful advertisement walls and a digital billboard. The scene then opens into a bright, exposed intersection dominated by a massive cylindrical tower marked with 03, where the player navigates through stopped traffic and pedestrians at a crosswalk. Finally, the camera moves past the tower and into an open industrial street, leaving the immediate structures behind to reveal distant futuristic skyscrapers under the overhead highway.
